data.title: TIM Buys Treasury Shares Amid Poste Italiane Takeover Offer
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Telecom Italia SPA ( (IT:TIT) ).

Telecom Italia S.p.A. (TIM), a leading Italian telecommunications operator offering fixed, mobile, and data services, plays a pivotal role in the national connectivity and broadband market. Its shares, listed on Euronext Milan, are widely held and closely monitored by investors due to the company’s central position in Italy’s telecom infrastructure and digital services landscape.

TIM disclosed that it purchased 296,014 of its ordinary shares on Euronext Milan on 2 July 2026, at an average price of €8.1517, for a total consideration of about €2.41 million. The buyback took place while TIM is the target of a voluntary public tender and exchange offer for all its ordinary shares launched by Poste Italiane S.p.A., indicating active capital management and potentially influencing the dynamics of the ongoing takeover bid and the balance of interests among existing shareholders.

The transaction was communicated in accordance with Italian securities regulations requiring periodic disclosure of treasury share purchases by issuers. By increasing its treasury share holdings during a public offer, TIM may be seeking to exercise greater control over its equity base, a move that could affect deal negotiations, market perceptions of the takeover process, and the strategic options available to both the bidder and TIM’s investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:TIT) stock is a Hold
with a EUR8.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Telecom Italia SPA stock,
see the IT:TIT Stock Forecast page.

More about Telecom Italia SPA

Telecom Italia S.p.A., known as TIM, is a major European telecommunications operator providing fixed-line, mobile, and data services primarily in the Italian market. The company operates key network infrastructure and offers connectivity and digital services to retail customers, enterprises, and public-sector clients, playing a central role in Italy’s telecoms and broadband ecosystem.

As a listed company on Euronext Milan, TIM actively manages its capital structure and shareholder base, balancing strategic investments in networks and services with financial measures such as treasury share transactions. Its position in Italy’s telecom sector makes its equity and ownership developments closely watched by investors and regulators.

TIM’s ordinary shares, traded under ISIN IT0003497168, are subject to regulatory oversight under Italian securities law and Consob regulations. The company’s stock is a bellwether for the domestic telecom industry, and movements in its shareholding structure can signal broader trends in market consolidation and strategic partnerships in the sector.

Average Trading Volume: 11,642,565

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €16.66B

For a thorough assessment of TIT stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Motorcar Parts Of America Extends CEO Employment Agreement
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An announcement from Motorcar Parts Of America ( (MPAA) ) is now available.

On June 26, 2026, Motorcar Parts of America, Inc. amended the long-standing employment agreement of Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer Selwyn Joffe, extending its term from July 1, 2027 to July 1, 2029. The amendment, approved by the Human Resources and Compensation Committee and the board, leaves other contractual terms unchanged.

In connection with the extension, the board conducted its scheduled review of Joffe’s compensation and approved two salary increases, lifting his annual pay from $828,256 to $902,799 effective June 26, 2026, and then to $984,050 from April 1, 2027. The move underscores the board’s commitment to leadership continuity at a time when executive stability is often seen as critical for strategic execution in the competitive automotive aftermarket sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (MPAA) stock is a Buy
with a $18.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Motorcar Parts Of America stock,
see the MPAA Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MPAA is a Neutral.

MPAA’s score is driven primarily by improving fundamentals and a stronger balance sheet, but held back by volatile/weak cash flow quality. Technicals are supportive with the stock trading above key moving averages, though momentum is nearing overbought. Valuation is roughly neutral with no dividend, while the latest earnings call was constructive due to upbeat FY27 guidance and margin/scale opportunities despite working-capital and timing risks.

click here.

Motorcar Parts of America, Inc. is an automotive aftermarket manufacturer and distributor, supplying remanufactured and new parts such as starters, alternators, and other components to retailers and professional installers. The company operates in the automotive parts industry, focusing on replacement products for vehicles across North America and other markets.

data.title: Helix Exploration moves into helium liquefaction with Keyes deal and £17.6m raise
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Helix Exploration Plc ( (GB:HEX) ).

Helix Exploration PLC has agreed a US$11 million conditional deal to buy the Keyes Helium Complex in Oklahoma, one of only six operational U.S. helium liquefaction plants and independent of major industrial gas groups. The facility will allow Helix to convert its Rudyard raw helium into liquid, access global buyers and diversify revenue through tolling, acquired at an estimated 65% discount to replacement cost and backed by an existing income stream.

To fund the acquisition and accelerate development at Rudyard, Helix is launching an institutional placing to raise up to £16 million at 22 pence per share, alongside a retail offer of up to £1.6 million. Net proceeds will support the Keyes purchase and drilling of four new production wells, while major shareholder Drachs Investments plans to invest about £7 million and gain board representation, underscoring investor support as helium prices rise and supply tightens in key U.S. regions.

Spark’s Take on HEX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HEX is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, continued losses, and worsening cash burn despite a debt-free balance sheet). Technicals are a key offset, with a strong uptrend and positive momentum. Valuation remains constrained by losses and the absence of a dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on HEX stock,
click here.

More about Helix Exploration Plc

Helix Exploration PLC is a U.S.-based helium producer listed on AIM and OTCQB, currently producing raw helium from its Rudyard field. The company focuses on supplying helium into critical end markets such as medical imaging, semiconductors, aerospace and other cryogenic applications, and is positioning itself as an independent, multi-source U.S. liquefier with its own production and infrastructure.

By acquiring and operating strategically located liquefaction facilities, Helix aims to serve a global buyer base and capture premium pricing in markets across Asia and North America. Its model includes tolling services for third-party explorers and aggregating helium from multiple fields, targeting opportunities created by declining legacy U.S. helium production and tightening supply conditions.

Average Trading Volume: 1,615,069

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: £51.81M

For an in-depth examination of HEX stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Pembina Pipeline Greenlights $4.6 Billion Alberta Gas Power Plant for Major Data Centre
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Pembina Pipeline ( (TSE:PPL) ) has issued an update.

Pembina Pipeline Corporation, together with Morgan Stanley Infrastructure Partners and Kineticor Asset Management, has approved a positive final investment decision for the Greenlight Electricity Centre, a 932 MW gas-fired combined cycle plant in Sturgeon County, Alberta, announced on July 2, 2026. The facility will supply dedicated, behind-the-meter power to a major data centre in Alberta’s Industrial Heartland, positioning Pembina as an early mover in serving the growing AI and cloud computing-driven data centre market.

Under a long-term tolling agreement, Greenlight will receive capacity and usage-based payments from the data centre customer, aligning the project with Pembina’s fee-based midstream model and providing a new stream of low-risk, contracted cash flows. The project, expected in service in the second half of 2030, has an estimated total cost of about $4.6 billion, or $2.3 billion net to Pembina, and is forecast to generate roughly $310 million in annual run-rate adjusted EBITDA, net to Pembina, supporting its 5–7 percent fee-based EBITDA per share growth target to 2030.

Pembina’s net investment in the project is expected to be approximately $2.1 billion after proceeds from a land sale to the data centre customer, with about 85 percent of capital costs secured under fixed-price agreements, including major equipment and services from Siemens Energy. The plant will require about 150 million cubic feet per day of natural gas, and Greenlight has already secured long-term gas transportation capacity on regional systems, enhancing redundancy and operational flexibility.

With ownership split between Pembina and MSIP at 47.5 percent each and Kineticor at 5 percent, the partners see GLEC as a scalable platform for future power-to-data centre projects, including potential expansion to 1,864 MW and further phases. The project has received all major regulatory approvals, and provincial and local leaders have framed it as a cornerstone investment for Alberta’s emerging data centre industry, job creation and broader economic growth, reinforcing Pembina’s strategic role in powering the province’s digital economy.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:PPL) stock is a Buy
with a C$69.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pembina Pipeline stock,
see the TSE:PPL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PPL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PPL is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial quality and cash generation backed by steadier pipeline/facilities fundamentals, plus constructive technical momentum. These positives are moderated by softer TTM growth, a meaningful pullback in free cash flow versus 2025, slightly higher leverage, and a valuation that looks less compelling despite the strong dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on PPL stock,
click here.

More about Pembina Pipeline

Pembina Pipeline Corporation is a Canadian midstream energy company that transports, processes and markets natural gas and natural gas liquids across Western Canada and North America. The company focuses on fee-based infrastructure and is increasingly targeting adjacent growth areas, such as gas-fired power for large industrial and data centre customers in Alberta’s Industrial Heartland.

Pembina leverages long-term, contracted models to generate stable cash flows and supports Canadian natural gas production through processing, transportation and related services. Its emerging gas-to-power platform is designed to catalyze new intra-basin gas demand while diversifying its revenue base beyond traditional oil and gas shippers.

The company often partners with institutional investors and specialized developers to co-own large assets, and applies its construction and project management expertise to deliver complex energy infrastructure on time and on budget.

Average Trading Volume: 2,601,302

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$38.15B

For a thorough assessment of PPL stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: STAR7 Secures €20 Million Bridge Loan to Fund Extraordinary Dividend
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

Star7 S.p.A ( (IT:STAR7) ) just unveiled an announcement.

STAR7 S.p.A., traded on Euronext Growth Milan, operates in the product information services industry, offering end-to-end support from engineering-related documentation to technical and marketing content creation, translation, printing and virtual experience solutions. Leveraging technology and specialized expertise, the company serves major international industrial clients across the entire product life cycle, reinforcing its status as a global partner for complex product information management.

The company has signed a €20 million bridge financing agreement with Banca Nazionale del Lavoro and Banco BPM to fund the distribution of an extraordinary dividend of €2.2329 per share to its outstanding shares, as approved by shareholders on 29 June 2026. The move underlines STAR7’s commitment to returning value to investors while relying on short-term bank financing, and the scheduled ex-dividend, record and payment dates align with Borsa Italiana’s calendar, providing clarity and timing for shareholders on the cash payout.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:STAR7) stock is a Hold
with a EUR11.90 price target.

see the IT:STAR7 Stock Forecast page.

More about Star7 S.p.A

STAR7 S.p.A., listed on Euronext Growth Milan, provides an integrated range of product information services spanning product and process engineering support, technical and marketing content creation and management, translation, printing, and virtual experiences. The company’s solutions cover the entire product life cycle, from design through after-sales, and its combination of specialized know-how, technology and broad industrial vision has enabled partnerships with major international clients and established STAR7 as a credible global player in the product information services market.

STAR7 is part of the STAR Group network and positions itself as a reference point for manufacturers seeking to manage complex product information needs across multiple languages, formats and channels, supporting global industrial operations with scalable, end-to-end content and documentation services.

Character ( (GB:CCT) ) has provided an announcement.

The Character Group plc has continued to execute its previously announced share buyback programme, purchasing 5,000 ordinary shares at a price of 292 pence per share. The shares, acquired via Panmure Liberum on AIM, have been cancelled, reflecting the board’s ongoing use of buybacks as a capital management tool.

Following this transaction, Character now holds 1,983,059 shares in treasury and has 17,380,949 shares in issue, which represents the total voting rights in the company. This updated share count becomes the new denominator for shareholders when assessing disclosure obligations, modestly increasing existing holders’ relative voting stakes and refining the group’s equity base.

More about Character

The Character Group plc is a UK-listed company whose shares trade on AIM. It operates in the consumer products sector and its ordinary shares of £0.05 each are actively managed through ongoing share buyback activity. The company maintains a treasury position in its own stock, influencing its capital structure and shareholder voting base.

Character has structured its equity to include both issued shares and treasury holdings, giving it flexibility in capital management. The number of shares in issue, excluding treasury stock, is used to calculate voting rights and disclosure thresholds for investors under FCA transparency rules.

data.title: Agnico Eagle Halts Barnat Pit Mining After Wall Movement, Trims 2026–2028 Output Outlook
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Agnico Eagle ( (TSE:AEM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On July 1, 2026, Agnico Eagle reported a rock mass movement along the north wall of the Barnat open pit at the Canadian Malartic complex in Quebec, prompting a precautionary suspension of mining in the pit. There were no injuries, equipment damage or environmental impacts, and the event occurred in a zone already under enhanced geotechnical monitoring and safety exclusion protocols.

During the halt in pit mining, the Canadian Malartic processing plant will run on low-grade stockpiled ore to limit near-term disruption, but the company still expects a production loss of 60,000 to 80,000 ounces of gold at the site in the second half of 2026. As a result, full-year 2026 output is now projected near the lower end of the 3.3 million to 3.5 million ounce guidance range, and Barnat-related constraints are currently seen reducing annual production by up to 150,000 ounces in both 2027 and 2028.

Agnico Eagle’s technical teams are conducting a detailed geotechnical assessment to determine when operations at Barnat can restart safely, and further updates to production and cost guidance are due with second-quarter results on July 29, 2026. The company says the incident does not affect development or the production outlook for the Odyssey mine, nor its longer-term goal of reaching 1 million ounces of annual gold output from the Canadian Malartic complex in the early 2030s.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AEM) stock is a Hold
with a C$170.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Agnico Eagle stock,
see the TSE:AEM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AEM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AEM is a Outperform.

High score driven primarily by very strong financial fundamentals (elite balance sheet, strong margins, solid cash generation) and a positive earnings update with reaffirmed guidance and shareholder-return focus. The main offset is weak near-term technical momentum (below key moving averages with negative MACD), while valuation is reasonable but not especially cheap.

To see Spark’s full report on AEM stock,
click here.

More about Agnico Eagle

Agnico Eagle Mines Limited is a Canadian-based gold producer and the country’s largest mining company, with operations in Canada, Australia, Finland and Mexico. Founded in 1957, it focuses on sustainable growth through a pipeline of development projects and has a long record of shareholder returns, having paid an annual cash dividend since 1983.

Average Trading Volume: 967,893

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$112.3B

See more insights into AEM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
